items.title: Stock market today: Dow soars over 1,000 points, S&P 500 and Nasdaq surge on news of 2-week US-Iran ceasefire
items.summary: Oil prices cratered as the suspension in hostilities raised hopes that the key Strait of Hormuz will soon reopen to shipping.

items.title: Morning Brief: Chicago Fed's Goolsbee 'nervous' about impact of oil shock on economy
items.summary: The stock market, with President Trump's threat to Iran that a "whole civilization will die tonight" at top of mind, still managed to eke out gains as hope remained on Tuesday of a diplomatic resolution.

items.title: Stablecoin issuers get closer to U.S. federal rules with FDIC's new proposal
items.summary: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. approved a proposed rule to govern the issuers, even as the Senate continues to debate GENIUS Act details.

items.title: S&P 500 Snaps Up One of the Market’s Fastest‑Rising Stocks—Should You Buy It?
items.summary: Casey’s General Stores (NASDAQ:CASY) is finally joining the S&P 500 club, and as one of the stealthiest low-tech growth stories out there, I think it’s about time to pay closer attention to the name, especially since it’s “working” in this kind of hyper-volatile environment. Whether it’s rising geopolitical risks or fatigue facing AI and tech ... S&P 500 Snaps Up One of the Market’s Fastest‑Rising Stocks—Should You Buy It?

items.title: Morgan Stanley's bitcoin ETF opens today, giving BlackRock’s $55 billion IBIT fund its toughest rival yet
items.summary: While BlackRock’s spot bitcoin ETF currently reigns as the liquidity king of crypto, Morgan Stanley’s MSBT will leverage a market-low 0.14% fee and $7 trillion wealth management engine to possibly challenge that dominance.

items.title: Bitcoin’s quantum threat is distant, but migration clock is ticking, says Adam Back
items.summary: Researchers are advancing post-quantum protections even as current hardware remains far from breaking crypto systems

items.title: Bitcoin buyers gobbled up nearly 850,000 BTC between $60,000 and $70,000
items.summary: A ton of BTC was recently traded below $70,000 in a sign of strong dip demand.

items.title: Ceasefire lifts bitcoin, but animal spirits may not return just yet
items.summary: Bitcoin clears a key technical hurdle and eyes $76,000 as a temporary ceasefire with Iran and Morgan Stanley’s landmark ETF debut restore market confidence.

items.title: NYT revives Adam Back theory in latest bid to identify Bitcoin creator
items.summary: A New York Times investigation points to Adam Back as Satoshi Nakamoto, but the Blockstream CEO denies it, and critics say proof is still missing.

items.title: Six Swiss banks join forces to build a unified digital franc
items.summary: The initiative brings major lenders together to trial Swiss franc stablecoin in controlled environment with real transactions
